nasb.text: ‘I must arise now and go about the city; In the streets and in the squares I must seek him whom my soul loves.’ I sought him but did not find him.

esv.text: I will rise now and go about the city, in the streets and in the squares; I will seek him whom my soul loves. I sought him, but found him not.

cnv.text: 我說：“我要起來，走遍全城， 在街上，在廣場上， 尋找我心所愛的。” 我尋找他，卻找不到他。

ccb.text: 我要起来寻遍城里的大街小巷， 我要寻找我心爱的人。 我寻找他，却寻不到。
